title: Fake hardcore heart
description: This resource pack change your Normal hearts to Hardcore hearts
body:
# Turn Your Normal Hearts into Hardcore Hearts

Transform your entire health bar with this Hardcore Hearts Resource Pack! 
This pack replaces your normal Minecraft hearts with the iconic hardcore-style hearts, 
instantly giving your game a more intense and high-stakes appearance.

Every heart in the game is included and fully redesigned. 
From your regular health hearts to all special variations, 
everything is converted to match the hardcore theme for a complete and consistent look. 
No heart is left unchanged.

This pack is perfect for content creators and series makers who want their videos 
to look more dramatic and engaging. The hardcore hearts add tension and visual impact, 
making every fight, close call, and clutch moment feel even more serious on screen.

Whether you’re recording a survival series, streaming PvP, 
or creating a hardcore-style challenge, this pack gives your gameplay 
that extra layer of intensity without changing any mechanics — 
just a clean and powerful visual upgrade.

## Perfect for:
- Survival Series
- Hardcore-themed Worlds
- PvP Content
- YouTube & Streaming Videos
- Challenge Runs
